summary: Multi-Casernes module fully tested. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Casernes tab visible, toggle works, CRUD modal functional, mode_caserne selector in type de garde edit form.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing casernes (Caserne 1 - Centre, Caserne 2 - Est)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Casernes module fully implemented and tested. Two casernes exist in demo tenant. Multi-casernes toggle is active. Types de garde have mode_caserne field with 'global' as default.

3_api_get_casernes.details: Returns list of casernes with id, nom, code, couleur, adresse, telephone

4_api_post_casernes.details: Creates new caserne, validates unique name

7_api_types_garde_mode_caserne.details: All types have mode_caserne field with 'global' or 'par_caserne' value

8_ui_casernes_tab_visible.details: Casernes card visible in Paramètres grid with 'Multi-casernes' description

9_ui_multi_casernes_toggle.details: Toggle section shows 'Mode Multi-Casernes' with Actif/Désactivé status and toggle button

10_ui_casernes_list.details: Shows 'Casernes (2)' with existing casernes when multi-casernes is active

11_ui_caserne_modal.details: Modal has all fields: Nom, Code court, Couleur, Adresse, Téléphone with proper data-testid attributes

12_ui_mode_caserne_selector.details: Mode caserne dropdown visible in type de garde edit modal with 'Global' and 'Par caserne' options
